originalTitle: U.S. stock futures mixed, oil prices surge as new attacks threaten the cease-fire with Iran
summary: U.S. stock-index futures largely erased initial losses Sunday, after a massive tech selloff on Friday interrupted Wall Street’s two-month rally, and after new developments threatened the fragile cease-fire in the Iran war.
content: U.S. stock-index futures largely erased initial losses Sunday, after a massive tech selloff on Friday interrupted Wall Street’s two-month rally, and after new developments threatened the fragile cease-fire in the Iran war.
chineseTitle: 由于新的袭击威胁与伊朗的停火，美国股指期货涨跌互现，油价飙升
chineseSummary: 在周五科技股的大规模抛售打断了华尔街两个月的涨势以及新的事态发展威胁到伊朗战争脆弱的停火之后，周日美国股指期货基本消除了最初的跌幅。
chineseContent: 在周五科技股的大规模抛售打断了华尔街两个月的涨势以及新的事态发展威胁到伊朗战争脆弱的停火之后，周日美国股指期货基本消除了最初的跌幅。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
